{marked_group_rule_text} {group_rule_text} {liberty_rule_text} How many empty neighboring intersections belong to the marked {player_color} group as liberties?
{marked_group_rule_text} {group_rule_text} {liberty_rule_text} Determine the liberty count of the marked {player_color} group.
marked_group_adjacent_enemy_count: {marked_group_rule_text} {group_rule_text} {adjacent_enemy_rule_text} How many opponent stones are directly adjacent to the marked {player_color} group?
{marked_group_rule_text} {group_rule_text} {adjacent_enemy_rule_text} Count the opponent stones touching the marked {player_color} group edge to edge.
{marked_group_rule_text} {group_rule_text} {adjacent_enemy_rule_text} What is the number of opponent stones directly adjacent to the marked {player_color} group?
{marked_group_rule_text} {group_rule_text} {adjacent_enemy_rule_text} Determine the adjacent opponent-stone count for the marked {player_color} group.
{marked_group_rule_text} {group_rule_text} {adjacent_enemy_rule_text} How many enemy stones touch the marked {player_color} group orthogonally?
marked_group_shared_liberty_count: {marked_group_rule_text} {group_rule_text} {liberty_rule_text} {shared_liberty_rule_text} How many shared liberties does the marked {player_color} group have?
{marked_group_rule_text} {group_rule_text} {liberty_rule_text} {shared_liberty_rule_text} Count the shared liberties of the marked {player_color} group.
{marked_group_rule_text} {group_rule_text} {liberty_rule_text} {shared_liberty_rule_text} What is the number of marked-group liberties that also touch an opponent stone?
{marked_group_rule_text} {group_rule_text} {liberty_rule_text} {shared_liberty_rule_text} Determine how many liberties of the marked {player_color} group are shared with opponent stones.

marked_group_stone_count: {marked_stone_rule_text} {group_rule_text} How many stones are in the connected group containing the marked {player_color} stone?

{marked_stone_rule_text} {group_rule_text} How many same-color stones connect edge to edge with the marked {player_color} stone's group?
{marked_stone_rule_text} {group_rule_text} Determine the number of stones in the connected group that contains the marked {player_color} stone.

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_open_board: a Go board with black and white stones and many open intersections
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_crowded_board: a Go board with many surrounding black and white stones
code_prompt_defaults.group_rule_text: Same-color stones connected edge to edge form one group.
code_prompt_defaults.liberty_rule_text: A liberty is an empty orthogonal neighbor of the group; diagonals do not count.
code_prompt_defaults.adjacent_enemy_rule_text: Count only opponent stones touching the marked group edge to edge; diagonals do not count.
code_prompt_defaults.shared_liberty_rule_text: A shared liberty also touches at least one opponent stone edge to edge.
code_prompt_defaults.marked_group_rule_text: The red outlined {player_color} stones are the marked group.
code_prompt_defaults.marked_stone_rule_text: The red outlined {player_color} stone marks the group to inspect.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_marked_group_liberty_cou: set "annotation" to a JSON array of pixel-space points [x, y] at every liberty of the marked {player_color} group
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_marked_group_liberty_count: set "answer" to the number of liberties of the marked {player_color} group
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_marked_group_adjacent_en: set "annotation" to a JSON array of pixel-space stone boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for every opponent stone directly adjacent to the marked {player_color} group
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_marked_group_adjacent_enemy_: set "answer" to the number of opponent stones directly adjacent to the marked {player_color} group
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_marked_group_shared_libe: set "annotation" to a JSON array of pixel-space points [x, y] at every shared liberty of the marked {player_color} group
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_marked_group_shared_liberty_: set "answer" to the number of shared liberties of the marked {player_color} group
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_marked_group_stone_count: set "annotation" to a JSON array of pixel-space stone boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for every stone in the connected group containing the marked {player_color} stone
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_marked_group_stone_count: set "answer" to the number of stones in the connected group containing the marked {player_color} stone
